products.title: Dell 15 (Inspiron) 13th Gen Intel Core i5-1334U (16GB RAM, 1TB SSD)
products.short_description: Dell 15 Inspiron with 13th Gen Intel Core i5, 16GB RAM, and 1TB SSD offers strong everyday performance, large storage, and a smooth 120Hz display—ideal for students and office users.
products.long_description:
The Dell 15 (Inspiron 3530) is a reliable mid-range laptop designed for students, professionals, and everyday users. Powered by the 13th Gen Intel Core i5-1334U processor, it delivers solid performance for multitasking, office work, browsing, and productivity tasks.

It features a 15.6-inch Full HD anti-glare display with a 120Hz refresh rate, providing smoother visuals compared to standard laptops. With 16GB DDR4 RAM and a massive 1TB SSD, the laptop ensures fast performance and ample storage for files, applications, and media.

The laptop comes pre-installed with Windows 11 and Microsoft Office 2024, making it ready for work immediately. The backlit keyboard and lightweight 1.62 kg design add to usability and portability.

However, users have reported mixed feedback regarding battery life, heating issues, and fan noise. While it is not designed for heavy gaming or high-end creative tasks, it remains a strong value-for-money option for everyday computing needs.
highlights: 1TB SSD for large and fast storage
pros: Good performance for office and student use
offers: Up to ₹2,069 cashback on select cards
